name: HRC_EVT_ATTRIBUTE_MAPPINGS
description: A Attribute Mapping is used to indicate that a particular Entity Object or PLSQL Row Handler attribute should be included in an Event Payload.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier

columns.Name: CONSTRUCTION_METHOD_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier of the Construction Method

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier of the Source Object Attribute

columns.Name: PAYLOAD_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier of the Payload Item to which the Attribute Mapping relates

columns.Name: CHANGED_ALWAYS
columns.Comments: Indication of whether the Attributes should Always be included in the Payload or only when its value has Changed

columns.Name: OLD_NEW
columns.Comments: Indication of whether the Old or the New  value should be used in the payload item mapping

columns.Name: EO_METHOD
columns.Comments: Name of the entity object method used to return the attribute value

columns.Name: SERVICE_PARAMETER
columns.Comments: Name of the standard Service Parameter that contains the payload data

columns.Name: LITERAL_VALUE
columns.Comments: Literal value that will be put in the event payload

columns.Name: MESSAGE_NAME
columns.Comments: Message Name that will be translated before being put in the event payload

columns.Name: SYSTEM_VARIABLE
columns.Comments: The name of a system variable that will be used to populate the event payload.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

indexes.Columns: CONSTRUCTION_METHOD_ID, SOURCE_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE_ID, PAYLOAD_ITEM_ID, SERVICE_PARAMETER, EO_METHOD, LITERAL_VALUE, MESSAGE_NAME, SYSTEM_VARIABLE, ORA_SEED_SET1
CONSTRUCTION_METHOD_ID, SOURCE_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE_ID, PAYLOAD_ITEM_ID, SERVICE_PARAMETER, EO_METHOD, LITERAL_VALUE, MESSAGE_NAME, SYSTEM_VARIABLE, ORA_SEED_SET2
